title: tephrosia macrostachya
intro: Tephrosia macrostachya, also known as the 'horsefly bush' or 'devil's thorn', is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tephrosia macrostachya include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
